title: Citrusy Moroccan Porridge Oats Stir-fry
description: A citrusy and fluffy hangover-cure Moroccan dish featuring porridge oats, stir-fried vegetables with a zesty twist, designed to be both plant-based-friendly and comforting for breakfast.

ingredients.name: Rice Bran Oil or Coconut Oil

instructions: In a large saucepan, bring the oat porridge to a boil and then reduce heat to low. Stir in saffron threads.
Heat oil in a wok or skillet over medium-high heat. Add onion and garlic; cook until translucent, about 2 minutes.
Add julienned bell peppers and carrots to the pan, tossing for 5-7 minutes until vegetables are soft but not mushy.
Mix in saffron-flavored porridge, lemon juice, and chopped fresh mint. Stir well to combine. Let simmer for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season with sumac and cayenne pepper to taste. Adjust seasoning based on personal preference.
Serve hot as a side dish or over rice if desired.
